description: Style Note It's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee and up your style quotient. Product Details Grey shoe with synthetic upper, overlays, decorative stiched detailing and central lace-ups Padded and meshed tongue and cushioned inner Globalite rubber midsole TPU outsole with textured grooves on the forefoot Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
